access_density_context.package_constraint: Any access package must improve reach to Squee/Top/Rack/Library while preserving seed-42 Squee, miracle, and topdeck telemetry.

guardrails.reason: Seed 42 is the known success anchor; a package that regresses it cannot be promoted.
Promise of Loyalty, Avatar's Wrath, Tibalt's Trickery, Prismari Pianist, and similar slots need a new rationale after repeated matrix regressions.
Runtime proposal overlays make candidate modeling possible in copied DB gates, but PostgreSQL/product truth still requires explicit approved apply/sync.
